name: law-pl
description: Lawpowers Poland — Codex support for Polish legal drafting and source workflows. Codex plugin ID: law-pl. Claude Code keeps the pl plugin ID.

interface.shortDescription: Polish legal drafting and source workflows
interface.longDescription: Lawpowers Poland provides skills and agent prompts for Polish legislation, legal documents, litigation, arbitration, family, labor, consumer, enforcement, RODO, source citation, and case-law workflows. Codex plugin ID: law-pl; Claude Code keeps pl.
defaultPrompt: Prepare a Polish court filing draft.
